About Anjana Welfares

Anjana Welfares Foundation is dedicated to delivering high-quality, impactful support through education, medical assistance, and essential basic needs, ensuring that real and meaningful change reaches those who need it most. We strive to create a lasting legacy of compassion and progress, fostering a community built on solidarity and shared responsibility.

We accept no donations,
funds or sponsorships.

Every initiative is entirely self funded — fuelled by the personal contributions, salaries and hard-earned resources of our dedicated youth members.

100%SELF FUNDED

Spot the gap

Members surface real, urgent needs from their own neighbourhoods — quietly and without judgement.

2

3

Deliver with dignity

Support reaches the right person directly, respectfully, and exactly when it is needed.

“We don't wait to be funded. We find the gap, we open our own wallets, and we fill it — at the right time, for the right person.”

About Us

#Everything for Everyone

A passionate, self-driven community of young minds, united by one powerful mission: to uplift society and pave a progressive path for the next generation.

About Us

Anjana Welfares promises to support Education, Healthcare and Basic Needs with responsibility, compassion and integrity. We believe that every child deserves the opportunity to learn, every individual deserves access to quality healthcare and every family deserves the dignity of life's essential needs. These are not privileges. They are the foundation of a better future.

Founded by Nawin, Anjana Welfares is a completely self funded charitable initiative established with a simple purpose to create meaningful impact through responsible action. This is not a public fundraising platform or a donation driven organisation. We do not accept donations, sponsorships, grants or financial contributions from individuals, companies or institutions. Every initiative is funded entirely through the founder's personal income and undertaken only when we have the ability to fulfil our commitment with honesty and accountability.

What sets us apart

We accept no donations,
funds or sponsorships.

Every initiative is entirely self funded — fuelled by the personal contributions, salaries and hard-earned resources of our dedicated youth members.

100%SELF FUNDED

Across India, millions of children continue to face barriers to education, healthcare and essential living conditions. According to UNICEF, approximately 206 million children experience at least one form of deprivation related to education, healthcare, nutrition, clean water, sanitation or housing, while more than 62 million children experience multiple deprivations. These numbers represent real lives, real families and real futures waiting for an opportunity to change.

At Anjana Welfares, we believe that genuine service is not measured by the amount of money collected but by the responsibility taken. We choose to act only when we have the capacity to make a meaningful difference, ensuring that every commitment is fulfilled with dignity, transparency and respect. Our goal is not to reach everyone at once, but to create lasting impact wherever we can.

As we continue this journey, our promise remains unchanged. We will keep supporting education, healthcare and basic needs with sincerity, responsibility and unwavering commitment. Every act of kindness begins with one decision to care, and every life we are able to support strengthens our belief that meaningful change starts with one responsible step. That is the promise of Anjana Welfares.

Transparency

No outside money means nothing to hide.

Freedom

No donors to please — only people to serve.

Responsibility

Change begins with each of us, together.

A collective force of modern youth.
Our Initiatives

Education

Books, fees, supplies and mentoring so deserving students never stop learning for want of money.

Explore

Explore
Initiative · Education

#Education for everyone

Every child deserves the opportunity to learn, dream, and build a brighter future—regardless of their family's financial situation.

As the first initiative of Anjana Welfares, we are committed to taking complete responsibility for the education of 100 roadside and economically underprivileged children by the end of 2026.

Our support goes far beyond paying school fees. We ensure that every child receives continuous educational assistance, emotional care, healthcare protection, and the resources they need to complete their education with dignity and confidence.

We believe that education is not charity—it is an investment in a better society. By supporting one child, we create the opportunity to transform an entire family's future.

100
children given complete educational support
— by the end of 2026

Our Commitment

We don't just sponsor a student's education—we walk alongside them throughout their academic journey.

Student Verification

Every student is carefully verified through home visits and family assessments to understand their genuine financial and educational needs. This ensures that our support reaches children who need it most.

Transparent Financial Support

A dedicated bank account is created or verified in the student's name, allowing educational support to be transferred securely and transparently.

Mental Health & Well-being

Many children face emotional challenges due to difficult family circumstances. Our in-house psychology team provides professional counseling sessions every two months to help students stay confident, motivated, and emotionally healthy.

Health Insurance

Every supported student is covered under a health insurance plan. We directly pay the insurance premium every month, ensuring access to quality healthcare without placing additional financial pressure on the family.

Complete Educational Support

From Grade 1 to Undergraduate Graduation, we provide comprehensive educational assistance, including:

  • ✓ School & College Fees
  • ✓ Books & Notebooks
  • ✓ School Uniforms
  • ✓ Stationery & Study Materials
  • ✓ School Bags & Learning Essentials
  • ✓ Examination Fees
  • ✓ Transportation & Travel Expenses
  • ✓ Digital Learning Support (when required)
  • ✓ Other essential educational needs

Our Promise

We are committed to supporting every selected student until they complete their undergraduate education. Our goal is not simply to fund education, but to nurture confident, healthy, and responsible individuals who can build a better future for themselves, their families, and society.

Together, we can ensure that no child is forced to give up their education because of poverty.

← All initiatives Help with Education
Initiative · Medical Assistance

#LifeforEveryone

In a densely populated country like India, health crises and epidemic outbreaks, such as fevers and dengue, pose a relentless challenge. We live in a society where access to timely medical intervention is still a luxury for many.

We at Anjana Welfares refuse to stand by. We are committed to protecting and preserving lives to the absolute best of our ability. Through our platform, we actively organize blood donation drives, provide critical basic medical support, and step in to ensure that financial distress does not cost anyone their life.

Our dedication to safeguarding the vulnerable is absolute, and we will fulfill our duty with total commitment and self-reliance, ensuring that help reaches when it is needed most.

← All initiatives Help with Medical Aid
Initiative · Basic Needs

#Future For Everyone

Providing a meal today may end today's hunger — but our mission is to ensure that the same person does not have to worry about tomorrow's meal again.

At Anjana Welfare, we believe that true support is not dependency—it is dignity, stability, and self-reliance. Food relief is only the beginning of our journey with every individual. Our goal is to help them regain confidence, rebuild their lives, and become capable of supporting themselves and their families.

We don't measure our impact by the number of meals we distribute. We measure it by the number of people who no longer need to depend on food support.

Our Sustainable Support Model

1

Finding Those Who Are Truly in Need

Every journey begins by identifying individuals and families who are struggling even to secure a single meal each day. Our volunteers personally verify their situation and understand the real challenges they face before extending support.

We believe every person deserves to be seen, heard, and treated with dignity—not as a number, but as a human being.

2

Creating Employment Opportunities

A meal feeds a person for a day. A livelihood feeds a family for years.

Our primary mission is to connect people with meaningful work based on their skills, physical ability, and local opportunities. Whether it is:

  • ✓ Daily labour
  • ✓ Housekeeping or assistant work
  • ✓ Packing and sorting
  • ✓ Agriculture and farm work
  • ✓ Small-scale manufacturing
  • ✓ Shop assistants
  • ✓ Warehouse support
  • ✓ Office assistance
  • ✓ Community service roles

or any honest source of income, we strive to help individuals earn with dignity instead of depending on charity.

Our dream is simple: no capable person should remain unemployed because they lacked an opportunity.

3

Continuous Follow-Up

Our responsibility does not end once someone receives food or employment. We stay connected through regular follow-ups to understand their progress, identify new challenges, and provide guidance whenever required.

This continued relationship helps us ensure that families remain stable and do not return to the cycle of hunger and poverty. Because real transformation takes time—not one visit.

4

Mental Well-being & Emotional Support

Poverty affects more than physical health. Many people silently carry the emotional burden of uncertainty. To support their recovery, we organise counselling sessions and well-being check-ins at least once every two months whenever possible.

By listening without judgment and offering encouragement, we help individuals regain confidence, hope, and the strength to move forward. Because a healthy mind is just as important as a healthy body.

Our Vision

Our vision is not to create long-term beneficiaries. Our vision is to create independent individuals who can confidently provide for themselves and their families.

When someone no longer needs food assistance because they have found stable work and regained their confidence, that is our greatest success.

Real charity is creating a future where charity is no longer needed.

Need Support?

Help Us Create Employment, Not Dependency

We are a self funded initiative. At this stage, we are not seeking financial donations. Instead, we invite individuals, businesses, factories, farms, shops, offices, and organisations to partner with us by creating employment opportunities.

If you have:

  • ✓ Small jobs
  • ✓ Part-time work
  • ✓ Full-time employment
  • ✓ Daily wage opportunities
  • ✓ Labour requirements
  • ✓ Assistant positions
  • ✓ Packing or warehouse work
  • ✓ Cleaning or maintenance work
  • ✓ Skill-based or unskilled work

… please let us know. One job opportunity can permanently change someone's life.

Together, we can replace uncertainty with dignity, unemployment with opportunity, and dependency with self-reliance.

Employment is the greatest form of support — it restores hope, confidence, and independence.

Partner with us

Our Promise

We will continue to stand beside every individual until they can confidently stand on their own.

Because our mission is not simply to feed people today — it is to ensure they never have to worry about their next meal again.

Education · Featured

When Karthik couldn't afford his final-year fees, a member quietly covered them. No donor drive, no paperwork — just one young professional helping another finish what he started. He graduates this year.

Volunteers

#Everyone for Everyone

We value the spirit of direct, personal contribution over centralized funds. Time and skill are the only currency we accept.

Our principles

How volunteering works

Direct Contribution

We do not accept cash donations or transfers into a central account. You contribute directly — even as little as ten rupees — to the person or cause, in your own name.

Guidance, Not Control

Our role is simply to guide you toward those in genuine need. When someone reaches out to us, we direct you to them so you can support them directly.

No Compulsion

There is no pressure from us. We never demand fixed amounts, cash, or goods. Your contribution comes purely from the heart — give what you can, when you can.

Transparency Through Direct Impact

Because your help goes directly to the person in need, there are no middlemen or hidden procedures — absolute transparency in every action.
